name: Copper Ore Node
desc: Copper ore — respawns daily. Use a pickaxe to mine.

name: Iron Ore Node
desc: Iron ore — requires an Iron Pickaxe to mine.

name: Gold Ore Node
desc: Rare gold ore — requires a Gold Pickaxe. Respawns weekly.

name: Lumber Area
desc: Chop trees for wood. Different trees yield different wood types.

name: Herb Foraging Spot
desc: Gather herbs — more spawn during rainy weather.

name: Clay Pit
desc: Dig clay by the riverbank — used for pottery and crafting.

name: Blanc's Gardening Shop
desc: Sells seeds, fertilizer, and planters. NPC: Blanc

name: Bob's Workshop
desc: Tool upgrades, ore purchases, and blueprints. NPC: Bob

name: Restaurant
desc: Learn new recipes, buy ingredients. NPC: Massimo

name: Furniture Store
desc: Buy furniture and decorations for your home.

name: Pet Shop
desc: Adopt pets and buy pet supplies. NPC: Mrs. Joan

name: Wild Berries
desc: Blueberries and raspberries — available in summer.

name: Mushroom Spot
desc: Various mushrooms appear after fall rain.

name: Shell Beach
desc: Collect shells and pearls on the beach in the morning.

name: Bill's Fishing Pier
desc: Buy bait and fishing rods. NPC: Bill
